item.title: Middle East war: Fresh Europe routes land for Australians as airlines avoid traditional UAE, Qatar hubs
item.description: More than 21,000 flights have been axed, crippling major hubs and forcing airlines to reroute passengers through Asia and beyond.

item.title: Adrian Dodoro and Brad Scott top the list as Kane Cornes unveils ‘wheel of blame’ to explain Essendon disaster
item.description: The commentator has revealed who is most at fault for the club’s current plight.

item.title: Dual rugby code great Wendell Sailor arrested by nine cops on drunken night out
item.description: The NRL and Wallabies legend threatened a bar manager before asking ‘do you know who I am?’

item.title: Charlie Kirk’s mentor and right-wing media trailblazer Jeff Webb killed in freak pickleball accident
item.description: The conservative activist said the US had ‘lost a future president’ after Kirk was assassinated.

item.title: Security group warns Australia’s democracy is being threatened by ‘anti-climate-action propaganda’
item.description: ‘If these threats are not checked, accelerating climate change will crash society as we know it.’

item.title: Nu Harvest owner Georgie Stevenson apologises over petrol price comments
item.description: The owner of the popular supplement brand has since apologised, pointing the finger at someone else.

item.title: Aussie Talia Gibson’s giant-killing run in Miami comes to disappointing end
item.description: The 21-year-old couldn’t repeat her heroics against the world No.2.

item.title: At least 66 killed in military plane crash in Colombia, head of armed forces says
item.description: Dozens more have been injured after the transport crashed shortly after take-off in Colombia.

item.title: Critics slam 'ham-fisted' plan to crack down on e-bikes as NSW, Queensland introduce harsh new laws
item.description: ‘Bringing in newer, tougher penalties, that’s just smoke and mirrors.’

item.title: Cheaper food, wine, cars and clothes to flow under 'hard yakka' European Union trade deal
item.description: But furious meat farmers say the deal is ‘appalling’ for agricultural and regional Australia.

item.title: Bluesfest cancelled: Relief for ticketholders as PayPal relaxes refund policy
item.description: Fans were given a glimmer of hope of Monday ... and it works.

item.title: Shock feud between AFL coaches Ross Lyon and Chris Fagan explained
item.description: ‘That is genuinely the feeling coming out of the playing group, as well as the footy department.’

item.title: Mel Schilling cancer diagnosis: TV star and dating coach dies aged 53
item.description: ‘To honour Mel, please live life to the full, love your people well, and try not to sweat the small stuff.’

item.title: Russia fires nearly 400 drones in deadly Ukraine attack
item.description: Almost 400 long-range drones, along with more than 20 cruise missiles and seven ballistic missiles hit several locations.

item.title: Victorian coach Chris Rogers’ call to omit Mitch Perry casts cloud over Sheffield Shield final against South Australia
item.description: ‘I spoke to a lot of people and nobody could really give me a compelling case either way.’

item.title: Economic expert reveals what would happen if Australia ran out of fuel
item.description: ‘The government needs to act on it very quickly.’

item.title: Australian winemakers allowed to continue producing prosecco after trade agreement reached
item.description: ‘It’s going to be fantastic for the industry.’

item.title: Brisbane Olympics 2032: New stadium design revealed alongside Gabba redevelopment ahead of Games
item.description: The $3.8b stadium continues to face legal challenges as a separate arena pushes ahead toward a 2031 opening.

item.title: Adelaide mum Lisa Cunningham freed on bail after seven years while on trial for stepdaughter’s murder in Arizona, US
item.description: ‘We’re devastated and heartbroken, and just grateful to be free.’

item.title: Rebecca Gibney still coming to terms with ADHD and autism diagnosis later in life
item.description: ‘It’s been hard. It’s been very emotional.’

item.title: Paul Walker’s Fast and Furious Nissan Skyline found in Norway living room after nearly two decades out of public view
item.description: ‘It is widely regarded as one of the most beloved vehicles of the entire series.’

item.title: US-Iran war: Families among those killed in escalating conflict in Lebanon as Israel vows to seize land
item.description: Israel confirmed plans to annex 10 per cent of Lebanon's territory in a move that could reshape the Middle East conflict.

item.title: Big Ukraine attack on Russia a day after deadly strikes
item.description: It has been described as the heaviest drone assault by Kyiv's forces since the war began.

item.title: Meta, Google lose US trial over social media addiction
item.description: A US jury has ruled YouTube and Instagram were ‌negligent in the design ‌of their apps ⁠and the companies that own them failed to warn about their dangers.

item.title: Hero of Bondi Beach terror attack Ahmed Al Ahmed honoured with keys to the city by Waverley Council
item.description: ‘His instinctive courage, his willingness to put others first, and his quiet bravery will never be forgotten.’

item.title: ABC staff slam broadcaster as they vow to continue fight for fair pay and conditions: ‘S*** boyfriend’
item.description: Workers at the national broadcaster have signalled further strike action if their demands aren’t met.

item.title: Whittlesea Bakehouse claims title of nation’s best hot cross bun for 2026
item.description: ‘I believe if you’ve got the love and the passion, the magic just works.’

item.title: Oscar Piastri makes light of F1 disaster with five-word gag ahead of Japan Grand Prix
item.description: The Aussie ‘comedian’ has won over even more fans despite failing to reach the start line this season.

item.title: Baby name trends revealed in list of NSW’s most popular newborn monikers
item.description: Eight names have entered or returned to the list.

item.title: Telstra increases price on postpaid and pre-paid mobile plans for millions of customers
item.description: Australia’s peak body for communications consumers called the move a ‘slap in the face’.

item.title: AFL veteran Tom Lynch comes clean on ‘rude finger’ team photo incident on Unfiltered
item.description: After the shoot, the ‘annoyed’ photographer had to completely airbrush it from history.

item.title: Golden Slipper winner Zac Lloyd chasing more Group 1 glory at Rosehill
item.description: The in-form jockey is keen to capitalise on his Golden Slipper success.

item.title: Australians risk carrying mortgage debt into retirement, new data shows
item.description: ‘Most people aren’t shown how their mortgage actually behaves over time.’

item.title: ‘Magic is back’: Teaser drops for remake of beloved Harry Potter series
item.description: Hogwarts is back in session, sparking a fresh wave of ‘Pottermania’.

item.title: Trailblazer Michelle Payne celebrates ‘truly extraordinary’ new honour as statue unveiled
item.description: The Melbourne Cup winner’s ‘most amazing journey’ has reached a new high on an emotional day at Flemington.

item.title: Qantas adds capacity to Europe routes including Rome and Paris as demand for international travel soars
item.description: Travellers looking to skip the Australian winter are in luck with the airline’s latest move.

item.title: Max Verstappen kicks journo out of Japanese Grand Prix press conference: ‘Get out’
item.description: Old wounds were reopened as the F1 superstar declared ‘I’m not speaking before he leaves’.

item.title: Aldi crowned cheapest supermarket for school lunchbox essentials in new survey
item.description: If you're packing school lunches, where you shop could be costing you hundreds extra each year.

item.title: Middle East war: Iran running out of time for US deal as Israel carves new borders in Lebanon
item.description: ‘They better get serious soon, before it is too late.’

item.description: It aligns with US President Donald Trump’s executive order on women’s sports ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Games.

item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Pokemon shop employee stabbed to death in Tokyo by knife-wielding man
item.description: A man reportedly wielding knives in both hands killed her before turning the weapons on himself.

item.description: Everyone is asking one simple question, while the man in the middle has fired back one of his own.

item.description: The presenter revealed a devastating conversation she had with her siblings, eight weeks after the disappearance.

item.description: Skyrocketing costs at the bowser could lead to another drastic shift on our roads.

item.description: Wendell Sailor has faced the music over criminal charges, but isn’t happy about some ‘fake news’.

item.description: The Canadian musician made the decision to step away from the stage in October last year.

item.title: Balcony likely to blame for deadly fungal outbreak at renowned Sydney hospital
item.description: The outbreak has left two dead and one still fighting for life months after being diagnosed.

item.description: Diners can provide a fuel or rideshare receipt to take advantage of the offer.

item.title: Sarah Ferguson stripped of Freedom of City of York title after unanimous vote by councillors
item.description: She previously lost her Duchess of York title when King Charles stripped Andrew of all his titles.

item.title: Electric vehicle loans double as pressured drivers dodge petrol pump as Middle East war causes price pressures
item.description: Unleaded petrol prices have jumped between 61 and 92 per cent in Australian capital cities.

item.description: When it comes to figuring out who to barrack for in the battle for the Pilbara, it helps to remember everyone is full of it.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Why sleeper agents are feared by intelligence agencies around the world
item.description: ‘It’s like finding a needle hidden within a stack of needles.’

item.title: AFL announces grand final start time to remain 2.30pm in 2026 and 2027
item.description: The league has made the call to end ‘the timeslot debate for another two years’.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Victoria announces free public transport throughout April amid ongoing fuel crisis
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Skoda quits China in epiq fall from sales hero to sales zero
item.description: Without a single EV in its local lineup, Skoda is leaving China after crashed from over 300,000 per year in 2018 to just 15,000 in 2025.

item.title: Long weekend family road trips presented by Mahindra: Port Stephens
item.description: SPONSORED: The Mahindra XUV700 is the perfect mid-size SUV for a trip to picturesque Port Stephens north of Sydney.

item.title: Scott McLaughlin breaks through fence in violent high-speed IndyCar crash at Barber
item.description: The helpless champion ‘knew he was done’ as his car hurtled towards the barrier at more than 200km/h.

item.title: Middle-aged men behind spike in charges for family and domestic violence offences
item.description: ‘Stronger policing and proactive detection’ have led to more offenders being brought to justice.

item.title: What estranged siblings can learn from Hilary and Haylie Duff’s fractured relationship
item.description: ‘Some families have a system of repair and others do not.’

item.title: Cupra Born VZ arrives in Australia – with a catch
item.description: The 245kW Cupra Born VZ electric hot hatch has finally arrived in Australia, but only as a one-off unit that has already been sold to a keen customer.

item.title: Ciaron Maher masterstroke in Australian Cup as Light Infantry Man edges out Pride Of Jenni for back-to-back wins
item.description: A thrilling race went down to the wire as a crowd favourite went toe-to-toe with a stablemate.

item.title: Mitchell Starc forced to issue personal statement after IPL absence criticised in India
item.description: The Aussie cricket great has called out ‘certain individuals’ and revealing a secret setback.

item.title: NRL hopeful Noah Johannssen dies aged 22 as brother Tim and clubs mourn ‘heartbreaking loss’
item.description: The rugby league community is mourning the sudden loss of a ‘young man of great character’.

item.title: Collingwood ‘disappointed’ as Darcy Moore gamble backfires with four-week hamstring and knee injuries
item.description: The skipper has been sidelined after scans uncovered two separate injuries.

item.title: Cyclone Narelle: Communities cut off as storm leaves widespread destruction in WA
item.description: ‘Some people’s lives have been drastically changed.’

item.title: North Melbourne ruck Tristan Xerri sent to tribunal for blood-wiping incident on Andy McGrath
item.description: ‘It’s gross and it’s a grubby act that we don’t want in footy.’

item.title: UFC fighter Joe Pyfer’s chilling suicide revelation after beating Israel Adesanya
item.description: The bout almost never happened after the 29-year-old found himself ‘in a very dark place’ just a couple of weeks ago.

item.title: ‘Hearts break’ as West Coast veteran Elliot Yeo suffers a groin injury in clash against Port Adelaide
item.description: The 32-year-old cut a dejected figure on the bench after suffering yet another injury.

item.title: Brisbane Airport issues safety plea with release of CCTV footage showing passenger accidents
item.description: A series of traveller mishaps in the busy terminal have been caught on camera.

item.title: Storm land Dolphins winger Jamayne Isaako to replace departing star Nick Meaney
item.description: ‘He is a high-quality and experienced player who adds speed and versatility to our backline.’

item.title: War in the Middle East reaches one-month milestone - here’s what you need to know
item.description: Donald Trump signalled a swift victory over Iran. This is what has happened in the weeks since.

item.title: Car driven by 17-year-old boy crashes into Kellyville home causing ‘extensive damage’
item.description: The occupants of the car were uninjured in the crash.

item.title: Rideshare driver charged after baby killed in Perth crash
item.description: A woman and another child were seriously injured in the ‘horrible’ crash.

item.title: Pressure ramps up on Carlton coach Michael Voss after latest capitulation against Melbourne
item.description: The Blues somehow coughed up a 43-point lead in another second-half nightmare.

item.title: AFL set to lock in Aussie icon Kylie Minogue for grand final entertainment
item.description: The big news comes fresh after the league confirmed the traditional start time.

item.title: Borce Ristevski could be out next year for killing his wife Karen as family fight to keep him locked up | Kiss and Kill
item.description: The high-profile killer could be out as early as next year for taking the life of his wife Karen in 2016.

item.title: Unlucky Oscar Piastri robbed of victory as Kimi Antonelli benefits from safety car to win Japanese GP
item.description: The Aussie looked on track for a stunning win before an unrelated crash ruined his chances.

item.title: Sharks bounce back from poor fortnight to notch impressive win in Canberra
item.description: The victory capped off a great week for newly re-signed coach Craig Fitzgibbon.

item.title: Indian city Kochi has been named in Booking.com’s Must-Visit Places in 2026 - here’s why
item.description: Forget Delhi, Mumbai or Kolkata. This coastal gem should be at the top of your India travel itinerary.
